hooks.command:
jq -r '.tool_input.command' | grep -q 'git commit' && echo '{"decision":"block","reason":"PRE-COMMIT REVIEW REQUIRED. Verify the Pre-Commit Self-Review Checklist before committing:
- No wildcard imports
- Use var for local variables where type is obvious from RHS
- @Slf4j on all production classes
- All records have @Builder(toBuilder = true)
- Controllers use Spring MVC @RestController — no WebFlux
- JPA @Entity on persistence entities — not in domain models
- MockMvc for controller tests — not WebTestClient
- Single-assert pattern with recursive comparison
- BDDMockito only (given/then, never when/verify)
- No generic matchers (never any(), anyString(), eq())
- MapStruct for all layer-boundary mapping
- Domain imports: only @Service, @Transactional, Lombok
- Constructor injection via @RequiredArgsConstructor only
- No @Autowired anywhere
- Error codes follow SP-XXXX pattern
- ./gradlew build passes

If you have verified all items, re-run the commit."}' || true
